prompt: Create a sun-drenched editorial lifestyle photograph in a Mediterranean café setting, vertical 4:5 composition. A stylish young woman with sun-kissed blonde hair sits relaxed in a wicker chair against a cream stucco wall with pale blue decorative trim, wearing a romantic strapless pink floral ruffled summer dress with a jeweled brooch at the bust and a matching pink floral silk headscarf tied under the chin with long loose tails. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered rectangular privacy block in a warm tan skin-tone color. She holds a large stemmed glass of cloudy pale yellow drink in her left hand near her mouth and an open travel guidebook in her right hand on her lap; visible accessories include neatly manicured pale nails and several rings. Show warm golden-hour sunlight, glossy tanned skin highlights, soft shadows, a partial white café table at the lower left, a glass door edge on the left, and a white handbag partly visible at the lower right. The mood is elegant vacation glamour, candid but polished, shot like a high-end fashion Instagram photo on film with natural grain, realistic textures, pastel pink palette, bright summer light, shallow depth of field, and no extra text or watermark.
